messages.author: David
messages.text: Woohoo this is awesome, nice one @Sveken ! If you're interested I've got some bigger versions of that exact same antenna that I'm not using - happy to throw one your way for that node, it might get you a bit more gain and range which helps us all!
messages.content_html: Woohoo this is awesome, nice one @Sveken ! If you're interested I've got some bigger versions of that exact same antenna that I'm not using - happy to throw one your way for that node, it might get you a bit more gain and range which helps us all!

Sveken
Testing the larger panel for shading performance as the tree it's going up as a very leafy top Other one is ready to mount to the trig this week

messages.author: Sveken

David
Woohoo this is awesome, nice one @Sveken ! If you're interested I've got some bigger versions of that exact same antenna that I'm not using - happy to throw one your way for that node, it might get you a bit more gain and range which helps us all!

messages.author: Sveken
messages.text: would you still use 8db if you want to service like the town under the hill, example huon hill etc?

messages.author: David
messages.text: Mmm hard to say which would be better close up like that — to be honest probably both would work just fine. But a little bit out of town and trying to hit the next town I would 100% go the big one
messages.content_html: Mmm hard to say which would be better close up like that — to be honest probably both would work just fine. But a little bit out of town and trying to hit the next town I would 100% go the big one

messages.author: Sveken
messages.text: My current list is, get the Tallangatta one up, which i have permission to do on private property so that should be safe. Then my tree climbing friend is hopefully going to mount that big panel one i have 10M up the tree up Jarvis Creek, that will link Wodonga to Tallangatta, and also hit falls creek, bogan, Benembra, Stanley, and The rock/Henty
messages.content_html: My current list is, get the Tallangatta one up, which i have permission to do on private property so that should be safe. Then my tree climbing friend is hopefully going to mount that big panel one i have 10M up the tree up Jarvis Creek, that will link Wodonga to Tallangatta, and also hit falls creek, bogan, Benembra, Stanley, and The rock/Henty
